qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authenticated low-privilege users can enumerate all sync-server users via /admin/users/
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns authenticated enumeration in `packages/sync-server/src/app-admin.js` on `GET /admin/users/`, not the advisory's missing authentication on the SimpleFIN and PluggyAI bank-sync endpoints in `app-simplefin.js` and `app-pluggyai.js`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal in /sync/upload-user-file writes outside the user-files root
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a low-privilege authenticated path traversal in `packages/sync-server/src/app-sync.ts` and `src/util/paths.js`; it does not involve the advisory's unauthenticated SimpleFIN/PluggyAI handlers or the same missing-session-middleware root cause.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final `qualifying_vuln` finding identifies the advisory's missing authentication on the SimpleFIN or PluggyAI integration endpoints, so no advisory-matched qualifying finding is available for tiering or PoC execution.
evidence: The advisory describes unauthenticated `POST /simplefin/*` and `POST /pluggyai/*` access caused by missing session middleware in `packages/sync-server/src/app-simplefin/app-simplefin.js` and `packages/sync-server/src/app-pluggyai/app-pluggyai.js`.

The qualifying finding `sync_server_admin_users_enumeration` instead covers authenticated disclosure from `GET /admin/users/` in `packages/sync-server/src/app-admin.js` after `validateSessionMiddleware`, with a missing admin-only authorization check rather than missing authentication.

The qualifying finding `sync_server_upload_path_traversal` covers authenticated path traversal in `POST /sync/upload-user-file` and `getPathForUserFile()`; it is a different endpoint family, code path, and root-cause mechanism.

The session does contain `simplefin_pluggyai_missing_auth`, which matches the advisory root cause, but its final status is `non_qualifying_vuln`, so it is contextual evidence only and cannot satisfy the requirement for a qualifying advisory-matched finding.
